code: import{useEffect,useState}from'react';import'./ZeusStatsBar.scss';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const ZeusStatsBar=()=>{const[health,setHealth]=useState(0);const[maxHealth,setMaxHealth]=useState(100);useEffect(()=>{const handleZeusStatsUpdate=event=>{const customEvent=event;setHealth(customEvent.detail.health);setMaxHealth(customEvent.detail.maxHealth);};window.addEventListener("zeus_stats_update",handleZeusStatsUpdate);return()=>window.removeEventListener("zeus_stats_update",handleZeusStatsUpdate);},[]);const percent=(value,max)=>{if(max===0)return 0;return Math.round(value/max*100);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"zeus-health-bar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"zeus-label",children:"\u26A1 Zeus"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"fill",style:{width:`${percent(health,maxHealth)}%`}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text",children:`${health} / ${maxHealth}`})]})]});};export default ZeusStatsBar;
